description: You are the artistic director for a local nonprofit community theater troupe that has just leased an empty open-span building. Design the floor plan for the new community theater to be presented to the fire marshal and board of directors. The layout must include at least 4 distinct functional zones: a public Lobby/Box Office, a central Auditorium, a Backstage area with dressing rooms, and public Restrooms. Divide the space with partition walls and define the room areas for each zone, applying a distinct floor color or texture to the Stage area within the Auditorium to visually separate it from the seating. Install at least 4 doors to ensure logical traffic flow between the Lobby, Auditorium, Restrooms, and Backstage. Furnish the theater with at least 30 chairs in the Auditorium arranged in rows facing the stage, 3 desks or tables for ticketing and makeup, 2 storage items for costumes or props, and 2 plumbing fixtures. Generate a 3D photo rendering of the auditorium showing the seating and stage and save the image to /home/ga/Desktop/auditorium_render.png. Save the completed project file.
